title: Cloak Of Invisibility
description: Craft a mystical cloak that grants the wearer complete invisibility. Perfect for stealth missions, pranks, or avoiding that one Creeper at your front door.
body:
### Invisibility Cloak
Craft a cloak that makes you go invisible! This plugin adds a craftable leather chestplate that toggles invisibility with a right-click. It is designed for balanced play by preventing you from wearing other armor while the cloak is active.

### Features
True Invisibility: Right-click(when holding the invis cloak) to vanish instantly and hide from all mobs and/or players.

Passive Health: Gives you +2 absorption hearts while wearing the cloak.

Automatic Reveal: Invisibility breaks if you attack, take damage, open a chest, or drop the item.

Armor Lock: You cannot put on other armor pieces while the cloak is being used.

Crafting Limits: Can be configured to limit how many cloaks a player can craft or block storage in Ender Chests.

### Commands
/inviscloak give: Gives you the Invisibility Cloak item.

/inviscloak reload: Reloads the config and the custom crafting recipe.

/inviscloak reset: Resets your craft count and makes your old cloaks stop working.
